texto: Hooking both thumbs into my waistband, I rocked my hips from side to side, and slid the dress pants down my thighs. As gravity took over, pooling the fabric at my ankles, I heard her say, “Sexy.” Bullshit. “Just so you know, I feel like an idiot.” “Just so you know, you’re melting my panties.” With a sarcastic snort, I grabbed a knee to pull my leg free. “Are you even wearing panties?” Chances were slim.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Annie Arcane: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Hooking both thumbs into my waistband, I rocked my hips from side to side, and slid the dress pan…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, sexy, panties pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
